name: DocuSign
description: Monitor DocuSign user access and envelope status for eSignature compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://developers.docusign.com/apps-and-keys
2. Create an Integration (App)
3. Set redirect URI to: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
4. Copy Integration Key (Client ID) and Secret Key
5. After connecting, enter your DocuSign Account ID and API base URL (found in DocuSign Admin > API and Keys)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews DocuSign users and their signing access

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Reviews recent DocuSign envelope activity for access audit
